bead.title: default work path must use power-only Execute, not DDx-side model routing
bead.description: Live symptom bead for the routing-boundary cleanup, amended by passthrough and upstream MinPower/MaxPower requirements. Current default work/legacy behavior can silently land on openrouter/gpt-5.4-mini or another unsuitable model because DDx still participates in route selection and pre-resolved model/provider plumbing. This bead is governed by ddx-c4231775: DDx must request abstract power bounds, carry any operator harness/provider/model constraints as opaque passthrough, and own retry escalation; the agent must own harness/provider/model routing and report actual model/power used. The original axon reproduction remains evidence for the regression test, but the fix is not to add another DDx routing rule.
bead.acceptance:
1. The axon-style clean-config reproduction no longer routes because of DDx-side ResolveRoute/reinjection or DDx endpoint/model policy.
2. Normal work path calls Execute with MinPower/MaxPower plus effort/permissions/task facts and no DDx-selected Harness/Provider/Model.
3. Operator-supplied harness/provider/model values are passed through unchanged when present and are absent otherwise.
4. If the agent chooses a lower-power model, evidence identifies requested_min_power/requested_max_power and actual returned model/power from Execute; DDx does not explain it as its own fallback.
5. A retry after DDx-owned eligible failure can raise MinPower without selecting or mutating a concrete model.
6. Regression test covers the historical silent mini-model failure and is tied to epic ddx-c4231775.
